description: A very large and heavy module needs to be lifted into place by a crane. The site supervisor must ensure all safety and operational checks are complete.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the approved lift plan for the operation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the lift plan, which details the crane size, rigging, and exclusion zones.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the crane has been inspected and the weather conditions (especially wind speed) are within the limits specified in the lift plan.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the crane's daily inspection is complete and the current wind speed is acceptable.
Agent gives the final go-ahead to the crane operator and rigging crew.
